nodes.name: West African wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The West African wattle-eye (Dyaphorophyia hormophora) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is found in Benin, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Sierra Leone, and Togo. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical swamps, and moist savanna. References
nodes.shortSummary: The West African wattle-eye (Dyaphorophyia hormophora) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is found in Benin, Ivory Coast…
